summary: Iteration 111: Automation Wiring, Client Portal Messaging + File Delivery Hardening - All 6 tasks verified. 15/15 backend tests passed. Task 1 (Prisma singleton) verified via code review. Task 2 (testimonial request on contract sign with dedup) tested. Task 3 (client message + owner notification) tested. Task 4 (file review reminder only for deliverables) tested. Task 5 (inquiry acknowledgement) tested. Task 6 (post-call quote reminder with dedup) tested.
critical_code_review_comments: Task 1: scheduledEmailService.ts correctly imports Prisma singleton from '../lib/prisma' - NO 'new PrismaClient()' found
Task 2: contracts.ts lines 538-555 - TESTIMONIAL_REQUEST scheduled 7 days after contract signing with dedup guard (checks for existing unsent email)
Task 3: portal.ts lines 399-468 - Client message saved immediately, sendNewMessageNotification called non-blocking for owner notification
Task 4: files.ts lines 219-238 - FILE_REVIEW_REMINDER only scheduled when hasReviewableFiles=true (DELIVERABLE or REVISION category)
Task 5: email.ts line 280 - sendInquiryAcknowledgementEmail exists with industry-adaptive copy (PHOTOGRAPHY/DESIGN/FINE_ART)
Task 6: leads.ts lines 1214-1228 - POST_CALL_QUOTE_REMINDER scheduled 24h after discoveryCallCompletedAt with dedup guard
seed_data_creation: Created and deleted test leads during testing (TEST_ prefixed)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 111 tested all 6 automation tasks. Key implementations: (1) Prisma singleton at /app/kolor-studio-v2/backend/src/lib/prisma.ts, (2) TESTIMONIAL_REQUEST scheduled in contracts.ts on agree with 7-day delay and dedup, (3) Client portal messages trigger sendNewMessageNotification non-blocking, (4) FILE_REVIEW_REMINDER only for requiresReview=true files (DELIVERABLE/REVISION), (5) sendInquiryAcknowledgementEmail in email.ts with industry-adaptive copy, (6) POST_CALL_QUOTE_REMINDER in leads.ts with 24h delay and dedup guard.

task2_testimonial_request_on_contract_si: POST /api/contracts/:id/agree schedules TESTIMONIAL_REQUEST 7 days after signing
Dedup guard: checks for existing unsent TESTIMONIAL_REQUEST before creating
Second agree call returns 400 'Contract already signed'
task3_client_message_owner_notification: POST /api/portal/:token/messages saves message and returns 200 immediately
sendNewMessageNotification called non-blocking for owner notification
task4_file_review_reminder_deliverables_: requiresReview=true only for DELIVERABLE or REVISION category files
Reference/other files do not trigger reminder
task5_inquiry_acknowledgement_email: Email sent non-blocking after lead creation
task6_post_call_quote_reminder_dedup: Reminder scheduled 24 hours after discovery call completion
Dedup guard: checks for existing unsent POST_CALL_QUOTE_REMINDER before creating
